auto_submitting_after_kutumba_fill: Auto-submitting form after filling from Kutumba
data_mismatch_description: The selected member's data differs from the current patient record. Please verify this is the correct person.

sync_from_kutumba_description: This will sync APL/BPL tags and Ration Card identifier for this patient using Kutumba data for {{name}} (RC: {{rc_number}}).
